title: Composition runtime container and lowering e2e suites

source.subject: test(composition): runtime container + lowering + host e2e suites

body:
End-to-end tests cover composition runtime container wiring, lowering, and host integration for `launch`/`with` concurrency forms.

## Provenance
- **Repository:** `compiler`
- **Commit:** [`5b65195`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/beskid_compiler/commit/5b65195)
- **Subject:** test(composition): runtime container + lowering + host e2e suites
- **Completed:** 2026-05-23

## Catalog scope
- **Delivery version:** v0.3 (Macros, concurrency, and stabilization)
- **Workstream:** `concurrency-runtime`
- **Domain:** `execution`
- **Deliverable:** `v03-merge-wave`

## Relation
Contributes to deliverable **v0.3 macro/runtime/ffi/tooling delivery** (`v03-merge-wave`).
